cr5bc_description: Kinder is named after the kinder joy chocolate egg. Kinder was found on the side of the road with her nose stuck in a crumpled kinder joy egg. Kinder is very playful and she needs a very playful family that will love her forever.
Electric, or as we call her Electro. She is a very good girl. She loves people so she wants a big family to go home with.
Sailor is a beautiful chicken who is not meant to be eaten. She is merely to be kept as a pet with other chickens.
Psych is a very generous bird. If you let her out she will come back with a surprise.
Scotty is an older cat who needs a loving home.
Cute cat who hates pickles.

Momo is a main coon. So she is bigger than other house cats. We found Momo in an alley. She was most likely dumped when her owners found out she wasn't a regular cat. so she needs a loving home that will accept her for who she is.
Ariel is named for her fiery red coat and bright teal eyes. Some say she looks like the little mermaid.
Chack is a duck who likes to EAT.
Porkie loves to fly around. He loves when you get him out of the cage and snuggle him.
Big Froggy who loves to be held.
Apollo is an amazing young bobcat he is very sweet and absolutely loves to play. Some people may think he is big and dangerous but really he is really quite friendly and he makes a great guard.
Rainbow is very playful and needs a great home where people can play with her daily she is very friendly towards everyone.

Ginger is an affectionate cat known for her excellent mouse-hunting skills. She is house-trained and enjoys cuddling, making her a delightful companion especially if you have a barn or a house that has mice.
Kyra is a beautiful feline who enjoys snuggling
Lilac is very sweet and gentle she would make the perfect edition to your family.
Harley has a passion for swimming and excels in it. Although he is an older dog, he still enjoys playing. If you have a pool, Harley would be thrilled to splash around and have fun.
Buddy is very friendly and loves kids,He is a very proud bird and is just a great bird to have around the house.
Cleo is an affectionate kitten who enjoys cuddling. She is eager to find a loving new home.
Cobbler is a lap kitty and is great for snuggling, she is potty trained and loves kids, she is beautiful, and a great cat.
Mothwing is a small female rabbit who loves to be around people
Crispy is an excellent cat who enjoys spending time outdoors to breathe in the fresh air.

Frita, the sweet-natured fox, embodies the essence of warmth and affection. With her striking bright orange coat, she captures the attention of all who encounter her. Frita is not just a beautiful creature; she is a gentle soul who adores cuddling, bringing joy and comfort to those around her. Her playful spirit and loving demeanor make her a cherished companion, radiating happiness wherever she goes. Truly, Frita is a remarkable girl, enchanting everyone with her delightful personality and stunning appearance.
Isla is a baby Iberian Lynx she is very sweet she loves to snuggle and is housetrained or you can put her outside she loves to play.
Beautiful Domino is a young border collie.  She is sweet, playful, energetic and loves to be around people.  She will quickly steal your heart and become a true member of your family.
Lena and Leo are a joyful brother and sister pair, known for their strong connection and inseparable nature.
This sweet little bird loves your company. Zippy loves to play he is also very good with children.
Tyra is a beautiful amazing leopard she is very friendly and good with people she is a very sweet girl, even though she is big but she will not hurt you.
Timmy is a handsome tiger he is the perfect pet if you are looking for a pet tiger he is the best of his kind.

Sita is very playful she is good with kids she loves to be outside and loves to run. She will need a very big yard to play in, and lots of space but other than that she is the perfect pet looking for her forever home.

Athena is a very calm lynx she is very good with children. Athena loves to be with people once you have a bond with her she loves to be with her owner she is housetrained but you could also leave her outside she is a very sweet girl and is looking for her forever family.

Spidey and Spunkey are sweet siblings who were abandoned by there troop because the troop did not have enough food for them. Their mother was later captured by the zoo because she could't keep up with the troop. She slowed down because it broke her heart to leave her son and daughter behind.  We found them and took them in.  We want them to go toether to their forever home because we don't want their hearts broken again.

Hunter is a sweet, very active Husky. He was named Hunter because he loves to play hide-n-seek with people and things.If you hide from him, he will surely find you.If you hide a treat he will also hunt until he finds it.If you leave your toys or socks on the floor, Hunter will hide them and later hunt them for you.
Our Bengal cat is an excellent companion; she is fully house-trained and has a fondness for children.
Chocolate is a playful puppy who tends to chew on shoes, so it's advisable to keep them out of reach. Additionally, he requires plenty of playtime to stay happy and engaged.
Kangy is a mini kangaroo so she will stay this size and she is a really good girl

Isabella, affectionately known as Izzy, is a gentle and affectionate cat we discovered on the streets, likely abandoned. She is in need of a caring family to provide her with the love and support she deserves.

Ginny is a fiesty lion head and aproximatly 6 months old and looking for her
forever home she is housebroken and has lovely manners

Miracle is a cat that has a long story but let me tell you what we know..we found Miracle as a kitten on the streets she was lying on her side she was in awful shape she had wounds on both of her ears and cuts all over her so we took her to the vet the veterinarian cleaned her wounds and in 3 days her cuts healed but her ears were still in terible shape 3 more days passed and she was out but the veterinarian said she would never hear again so Miracle needs a calm home with no kids and a very loving family and home
Pirate is a cute little thief he steals your house shoes because thats his favorite toy so keep them out of his reach but other then that he is really sweet and well behaved
Suzy is such a sweet girl probably  the sweetest her she loves everyone and is house trained
Norie is a great dog she is going to have puppies so if you want 4 puppies and grown dog then Norie is the way to go Norie is potty trained and loves kids
Sadie is a very cute kitten and she is looking for her forever home she is very playful
Slither loves to watch Harry Potter and is a fan of Nagini Slither likes people and likes to curl up and take a nap and she has special toys because she doesn't have good eyesight

Mrs. Norris is a middle-aged female cat with a spirited personality. Once she is out of sight, she disappears in an instant, moving swiftly and stealthily as she explores her surroundings. Her long fur requires weekly grooming to keep it in good condition.
Stella has had a really tough life and needs a quiet loving home she is a really sweet cat
Talon is a very proud and noble bird,he is a devine bird and is very friendly, he is great with kids we bought Talon from Dollywood

Crystal is an elderly cat who possesses a unique ability to provide comfort when someone is unwell. Despite her age, she is fully potty trained and has a gentle disposition, making her a great companion for children. Crystal is in need of a loving home where she can continue to share her warmth and affection.
These two brothers are quite playful, and while their antics may sometimes be a bit rough, there is no need for concern as they are unlikely to cause harm to themselves or others.
Calypso is an inquisitive girl who enjoys playing hide and seek and delights in being cuddled.

Tangerine is a delightful little fox, radiating sweetness and charm. With her playful spirit and affectionate nature, she embodies the joy of companionship. This beautiful girl has a heart full of love, especially for children, making her the perfect addition to your family. Her fun-loving demeanor and gentle personality ensure that she will bring endless happiness and warmth to any home. Tangerine truly deserves a loving family that will cherish her and provide her with the care and affection she so richly deserves.
